topic: Plotting points and drawing polygons on coordinate plane, finding distance between points
answer_latex: Part A: Polygon with vertices $P(-4,-3)$, $Q(-4,3)$, $R(0,5)$, $S(4,3)$, $T(4,-3)$ connected in order; Part B: c. 6 units
diagram_notes: Coordinate plane with axes from -8 to 8. Plot and connect vertices P(-4,-3), Q(-4,3), R(0,5), S(4,3), T(4,-3) to form a pentagon.
